LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND TONY BOTTS' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS OFF CALENDAR. THE CLERK SHOULD NOT HAVE ACCEPTED THIS FILING. DEFENDANTS FILED THEIR MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS ON AUGUST 7, 2013, BUT THEY WERE DEFAULTED ON JUNE 20, 2013. THE PARTIES SUBSEQUENTLY STIPULATED TO VACATE THE DEFAULTS ON SEPTEMBER 30, 2013. DEFENDANTS MAY RE-FILE THEIR MOTION IN THEIR DISCRETION. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Continued To Jan-29-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and TONY BOTTS' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND TONY BOTTS' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is off calendar. The clerk should not have accepted this filing. Defendants filed their motion for judgment on the pleadings on August 7, 2013, but they were defaulted on June 20, 2013. The parties subsequently stipulated to vacate the defaults on September 30, 2013. Defendants may re-file their motion in their discretion. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Continued To Oct-07-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and TONY BOTTS' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued on the Court's own motion to October 7, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
